---
name: scaffold-ticket
description: Generate a support or engineering ticket scaffold with reproducible context and exit criteria.
agent: planner
argument-hint: "[ticket title] [problem or request]"
---
Use xuanwu-app-skill first.

Write a ticket scaffold that can move directly into implementation.

- summarize the problem or request
- capture affected routes, modules, and roles
- define acceptance criteria and non-goals
- suggest the smallest safe implementation slice
- return a concise template ready for GitHub issue or project tracking use
